analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet merely announces/link-shares the full text of Xi Jinping’s remarks at a G20 side event on safeguarding the planet, without quoting or summarizing any content. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no critique of the West. CH2 (China as benevolent power) – Not explicitly present; although the topic hints at international cooperation, the tweet provides no framing that portrays China as benevolent. CH3 (epic history) – Not present. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not present. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – Not present. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not present. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral announcement with no clear promotion of listed narratives.
